prefix_map = {
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/lef': f'{CF_BASE}/lef',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/hdl': f'{CF_BASE}/hdl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/lib': f'{CF_BASE}/lib',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/gds': f'{CF_BASE}/gds',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32': f'{CF_BASE}',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_XIP/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_XIP/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_AMBA/v1.1.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_COMMON/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_COMMON/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_GPIO/v1.6.0/rtl',

    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_SPI/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_SPI/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_I2C/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_I2C/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_TMR/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_TMR/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_PWM/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_PWM/v2.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_DMAC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_DMAC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_CRC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_CRC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AES/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_AES/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_WWDT/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_WWDT/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_RTC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_RTC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_SYSTICK/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_SYSTICK/v1.0.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_RV32/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_RV32/v1.1.0/rtl',
}

def fix_path(p):
    if not isinstance(p, str):
        return p
    for old, new in prefix_map.items():
        if p.startswith(old):
            return new + p[len(old):]
    return p

def fix_value(v):
    if isinstance(v, str):
        return fix_path(v)
    elif isinstance(v, list):
        return [fix_value(item) for item in v]
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        return {k: fix_value(val) for k, val in v.items()}
    return v

with open(config_path) as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)

# Walk entire config and fix all paths
new_cfg = {k: fix_value(v) for k, v in cfg.items()}

with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(new_cfg, f, indent=4)

# Validate all file paths
def collect_paths(v, result=None):
    if result is None: result = []
    if isinstance(v, str) and ('/' in v) and (v.endswith('.v') or v.endswith('.sv') or
       v.endswith('.lef') or v.endswith('.lib') or v.endswith('.gds') or
       v.endswith('.def') or v.endswith('.sdc') or v.endswith('.tcl')):
        result.append(v)
    elif isinstance(v, list):
        for item in v: collect_paths(item, result)
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        for val in v.values(): collect_paths(val, result)
    return result

all_paths = collect_paths(new_cfg)
broken = [p for p in all_paths if not os.path.exists(p)]
ok = [p for p in all_paths if os.path.exists(p)]

print(f"All file paths: {len(all_paths)}, OK: {len(ok)}, BROKEN: {len(broken)}")
for b in broken[:20]:
    print(f"  BROKEN: {b}")

"""Fix ALL stale /workspace/.../ip/ paths in config.json to /nc/ip/ equivalents."""
import json, os, re

config_path = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json'

CF_BASE = '/nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc'
NC_IP_BASE = '/nc/ip'

# Map from old workspace path fragment to new /nc/ip path
prefix_map = {
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/lef': f'{CF_BASE}/lef',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/hdl': f'{CF_BASE}/hdl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/lib': f'{CF_BASE}/lib',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/gds': f'{CF_BASE}/gds',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32': f'{CF_BASE}',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_XIP/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_XIP/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_AMBA/v1.1.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_COMMON/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_COMMON/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_GPIO/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_UART/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_UART/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_SPI/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_SPI/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_I2C/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_I2C/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_TMR/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_TMR/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_PWM/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_PWM/v2.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_DMAC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_DMAC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_CRC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_CRC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AES/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_AES/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_WWDT/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_WWDT/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_RTC/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_RTC/v1.6.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_SYSTICK/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_SYSTICK/v1.0.0/rtl',
    '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_RV32/rtl': f'{NC_IP_BASE}/NC_RV32/v1.1.0/rtl',
}

def fix_path(p):
    if not isinstance(p, str):
        return p
    for old, new in prefix_map.items():
        if p.startswith(old):
            return new + p[len(old):]
    return p

def fix_value(v):
    if isinstance(v, str):
        return fix_path(v)
    elif isinstance(v, list):
        return [fix_value(item) for item in v]
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        return {k: fix_value(val) for k, val in v.items()}
    return v

with open(config_path) as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)

# Walk entire config and fix all paths
new_cfg = {k: fix_value(v) for k, v in cfg.items()}

with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(new_cfg, f, indent=4)

# Validate all file paths
def collect_paths(v, result=None):
    if result is None: result = []
    if isinstance(v, str) and ('/' in v) and (v.endswith('.v') or v.endswith('.sv') or
       v.endswith('.lef') or v.endswith('.lib') or v.endswith('.gds') or
       v.endswith('.def') or v.endswith('.sdc') or v.endswith('.tcl')):
        result.append(v)
    elif isinstance(v, list):
        for item in v: collect_paths(item, result)
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        for val in v.values(): collect_paths(val, result)
    return result

all_paths = collect_paths(new_cfg)
broken = [p for p in all_paths if not os.path.exists(p)]
ok = [p for p in all_paths if os.path.exists(p)]

print(f"All file paths: {len(all_paths)}, OK: {len(ok)}, BROKEN: {len(broken)}")
for b in broken[:20]:
    print(f"  BROKEN: {b}")
